role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline produced a highly coherent and visually grounded discussion. The agents correctly identified the tropical/subtropical setting and the specific 'Google car hood' artifact. While the final prediction (Puerto Rico) was incorrect (Ground Truth: Guam), the reasoning was internally consistent and the failure was due to the ambiguity of the visual evidence (Guam and PR share these exact features), not agent error.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of lush vegetation and flat terrain match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant identifications are plausible for the visible scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Sign shape and pole types match the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Guam was not in the candidate pool.
